creator: lcremean@tidalwave.net
text:
(this is being reported for a friend, Chris Eslinger <yakko@yallp.com>)

On a system with a Fujitsu 4.3 GB (master) and a Mitsumi ATAPI CD-ROM (slave)on the primary port,
and two Western Digitals on the secondary (31600 as master, 31200 as slave), sometimes
the 31200 will not be detected correctly--it either says it's using fake geometry values, or
detects no model numbers and 0xFFFF for all the geometry parameters. This does not happen in OSes 
other than FreeBSD.

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: Not known...I gather that it happens every time the boot floppy is used.
